description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a slim build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved V-neck shirt layered over a long-sleeved undershirt, paired with straight-cut pants. The figure's shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The head features medium-length, straight hair that frames the face and covers the ears. The overall appearance is casual and unadorned, with no visible accessories or carried items. The proportions and posture suggest a typical pedestrian encountered in city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright with arms outstretched, wearing layered shirts and straight pants, with medium-length hair and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neck shirt, long sleeves, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair length, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved V-neck shirt over a long-sleeved undershirt and straight-cut pants
